panel_discord_widget: Discord widget — add your server ID to enable
download_full_client_desc: Complete game client — recommended for new players
download_antivirus_note: If the patcher does not start, it may be blocked by your antivirus. Add it to your exceptions list or temporarily disable your antivirus during the patching process.
forgot_password_desc: Enter your username and registered email to reset your password.
forgot_password_not_found: No account found with that username and email combination.
forgot_password_success: Password has been reset. You can now log in.
validation_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation_password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters.
validation_login_min: Username must be at least 4 characters.
validation_securitycode_digits: Delete code must be exactly 7 digits.
terms_acceptance_text: By accessing or using this website and game server, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please discontinue use immediately.
terms_service_text: Metin2Ignition is an unofficial private server for the game Metin2. We are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to NCSoft or Webzen in any way. This service is provided free of charge for entertainment purposes.
terms_accounts_text: You may register one account per person. Accounts are non-transferable. We reserve the right to suspend or permanently ban any account that violates these terms, without prior notice or compensation.
terms_conduct_text: The following behaviors are strictly prohibited:
terms_conduct_1: Use of cheats, hacks, bots, or any third-party software that provides an unfair advantage
terms_conduct_2: Exploiting bugs or glitches — report them to the team instead
terms_conduct_3: Harassment, hate speech, or abusive language toward other players or staff
terms_conduct_4: Spamming, advertising, or impersonating staff members
terms_shop_text: All purchases made in our virtual shop are final. Virtual items and currency have no real-world monetary value and cannot be exchanged for real money. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue shop items at any time.
terms_liability_text: We provide this service as-is, without any warranties. The server may be modified, reset, or shut down at any time without prior notice. We are not liable for any loss of in-game progress, items, or currency.
terms_ip_text: Metin2 game assets, graphics, and engine are the property of NCSoft and Webzen. All custom content, code, and modifications created by the Metin2Ignition team remain our intellectual property.
refund_general_text: All purchases made on Metin2Ignition are considered final. Due to the digital nature of our products, we generally do not offer refunds once a purchase has been completed and items have been delivered to your account.
refund_exceptions_text: Refunds may be considered in the following exceptional circumstances:
refund_exception_1: You were charged but did not receive the purchased items due to a technical error on our side
refund_exception_2: Duplicate charges occurred for the same transaction
refund_exception_3: The purchase was made fraudulently and you can provide proof
refund_process_text: To request a refund, contact our support team within 7 days of the transaction. Include your account name, transaction ID, date, and a description of the issue. We will review your case and respond within 5 business days.
refund_contact_text: Send your refund request to: contact@metin2ignition.com — Please include all relevant details to speed up the process.
privacy_data_text: We collect the following personal data when you register or use our service:
privacy_data_4: Date and time of registration and last login
privacy_purpose_text: Your data is used exclusively for the following purposes:
privacy_purpose_2: Communication regarding your account (e.g. password reset)
privacy_purpose_3: Prevention of cheating, fraud, and abuse
privacy_storage_text: Your data is stored securely on our servers. We retain account data for up to 2 years after your last login. You may request deletion at any time. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties.
privacy_rights_text: Under GDPR, you have the following rights:
privacy_right_1: Right of access — you can request a copy of the data we hold about you
privacy_right_2: Right to rectification — you can request correction of inaccurate data
privacy_right_3: Right to erasure — you can request deletion of your account and data
privacy_right_4: Right to restriction — you can request we limit processing of your data
privacy_cookies_text: We use only essential session cookies required for authentication. We do not use tracking cookies or third-party advertising cookies.
privacy_contact_text: For any data-related requests, contact us at: contact@metin2ignition.com — We will respond within 30 days as required by GDPR.
contact_intro: Have a question, found a bug, or need support? Reach out to us through one of the channels below. We aim to respond as quickly as possible.
contact_response_time: Our average response time is 24-48 hours. For urgent in-game issues, please use our Discord server for faster support.
about_who_text: Metin2Ignition is a private server project created by a passionate team of Metin2 fans. Our goal is to bring a fresh, balanced, and enjoyable experience to the Metin2 community.
about_mission_text: We believe in a fair, fun, and community-driven gaming experience. Our team works continuously to improve the server, fix bugs, add new content, and keep the game balanced for all players.
about_disclaimer_text: Metin2Ignition is an unofficial fan project and is not affiliated with NCSoft or Webzen. Metin2 is a registered trademark of its respective owners. All original game assets belong to their rightful owners.
shop_no_items: No items available at the moment.
shop_purchase_success: Purchase successful! Item will be delivered in-game.
